fields.name: coreSiteXml
fields.label: core-site.xml
fields.help: Paste the backend cluster's core-site.xml. Only for a manually-managed EXTERNAL context — KDPS mounts it (with hdfs-site.xml) at /etc/hadoop/conf so services (e.g. Trino's Hive/HDFS connector) can reach the backend. For CDP contexts KDPS downloads this automatically from Cloudera Manager; for a REMOTE Ambari context it reads it from the remote Ambari; leave blank there.

fields.name: hdfsSiteXml
fields.label: hdfs-site.xml
fields.help: Paste the backend cluster's hdfs-site.xml (needed to resolve the HDFS nameservice / namenode HA). Manual EXTERNAL context only; auto-sourced for CDP and REMOTE Ambari contexts.

fields.name: hiveSiteXml
fields.label: hive-site.xml
fields.help: Optional. Paste the backend cluster's hive-site.xml for services that read it directly. Manual EXTERNAL context only; auto-sourced for CDP and REMOTE Ambari contexts.
